message:
test: add 43-test proptest suite for swarm_pipeline (ft-3681t.3.1)

Property-based tests covering serde roundtrips (11 types), backoff strategy
monotonicity, circuit breaker state machine transitions, pipeline DAG
validation, topological ordering, hook registry priority, and execution
lifecycle properties.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
